fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your Mailchimp API key. You can find this in your Mailchimp account under Account > Extras > API keys.

custom_description:
Mailchimp is an email marketing platform that enables businesses to create, send, and analyze
email campaigns, manage subscriber lists, and automate marketing workflows. This connector
provides read access to campaigns, lists, reports, email activity, automations, and more
for marketing analytics and audience management.
supported_questions:
- List all subscribers in my main mailing list
- List all automation workflows in my account
- Show me all segments for my primary audience
- List all interest categories for my primary audience
- Show me email activity for a recent campaign
- Show me the performance report for a recent campaign
- Show me all my email campaigns from the last month
- What are the open rates for my recent campaigns?
- Who unsubscribed from list {list_id} this week?
- What tags are applied to my subscribers?
- How many subscribers do I have in each list?
- What are my top performing campaigns by click rate?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new email campaign
- Add a subscriber to my list
- Delete a campaign
- Update subscriber information
- Send a campaign now
- Create a new automation workflow

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of records to return. Default is 10. Maximum is 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Used for pagination, this is the number of records from a collection to skip.

parameters.description: The status of the campaign

parameters.description: Restrict the response to campaigns sent before the set time

parameters.name: since_send_time
parameters.description: Restrict the response to campaigns sent after the set time

parameters.name: before_create_time
parameters.description: Restrict the response to campaigns created before the set time

parameters.name: since_create_time
parameters.description: Restrict the response to campaigns created after the set time

parameters.description: Determines the order direction for sorted results
